pkgmetadata.longdescription: Animated Plymouth boot splash theme for Pentoo Linux. Reaper Tux mascot centered on 1920x1080 frame with animated binary matrix rain side panels, growing teal/cyan lightning bolt progress bar, scythe glow pulse, and www.pentoo.ch footer. 120 frames at 24fps, 5 seconds. Generated via tux_compositor.py from a single static illustration.

use.flag: Pull in dracut or dracut-ng for initramfs rebuild
